title: Fixed Sports Cover
sourceTitle: Korean Sports Magazine Cover Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Korean-style sports magazine cover portrait built around fictional adult national-team football star with calm champion confidence, left hand holding the FIFA World Cup Trophy aloft, and right hand holding a classic black and white soccer ball. Subject: fictional adult national-team football star with calm champion confidence appears as the confident adult football cover subject in a high-quality commercial photograph with polished sports-magazine intensity. Scene: Clean cover-style sports portrait environment with subtle studio or stadium-cover mood, minimal distractions, and emphasis on the athlete, trophy, and soccer ball. Composition: half-body above-chest portrait, slightly angled frontal view, looking down toward the camera; fixed half-body portrait above the chest, slightly angled frontal view, subject looking slightly down toward the camera, trophy raised in the left hand, soccer ball held in the right hand. Signature Elements: left hand holding the FIFA World Cup Trophy aloft and right hand holding a classic black and white soccer ball create the fixed sports-cover identity, with the trophy and ball held clearly as hero props. Style: High-quality Korean-style commercial sports photograph mimicking a premium sports magazine cover, clean retouching, crisp detail, strong cover presence, and aspirational football icon mood. Color Palette: Fixed magazine-cover sports palette with natural skin, polished jersey or athletic styling, gold trophy highlights, black-and-white soccer ball contrast, and restrained clean background tones. Lighting: Commercial cover lighting with clear facial structure, bright trophy reflections, controlled shadows, and enough contrast for a premium magazine-cover read. Camera: Half-body above-chest portrait, slightly angled frontal view, slightly low camera feeling, sharp focus on face, FIFA World Cup Trophy, and soccer ball. Materials: Trophy gold, classic soccer-ball panels, jersey fabric, skin texture, hair detail, and cover-photography finish remain realistic and crisp. Typography: keep the image as a clean magazine-cover style photograph. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
